description: Rigol DP800 series programmable linear DC power supply (DP831/DP832/DP821/DP811 and A variants). SCPI command set over USB, LAN, RS-232 and GPIB, supporting single and multi-channel output, OVP/OCP/OTP protection, measurement, timer/delay output and tracking.

identity.description: Standard SCPI identification query. Returns manufacturer, model, serial number and digital-board firmware version separated by commas.

commands.name: identify
commands.description: Query the instrument ID string (manufacturer, model, serial number, digital board version).

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clear all the event registers.

commands.name: event_status_enable
commands.description: Set/query the enable register of the standard event register.

commands.name: event_status_register
commands.description: Query (and clear) the event register of the standard event register.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Set the OPC bit in the standard event register when the operation completes; query returns 1 when complete.

commands.name: option_query
commands.description: Query the installation status of options (high resolution, analyzer, monitor, LAN, RS232, trigger).

commands.name: power_on_status_clear
commands.description: Enable/disable clearing of the status byte and standard event enable registers at power-on.

commands.name: recall_state
commands.description: Recall an instrument state stored in internal memory (locations 1 to 10).

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Restore the power supply to factory state and clear the error queue.

commands.name: save_state
commands.description: Save the current instrument state to internal memory (locations 1 to 10) using the default filename.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Set/query the enable register of the status byte register.

commands.name: status_byte
commands.description: Query the summary register of the status byte register (without clearing it).

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Generate a trigger operation. Only available when bus (software) trigger is selected.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Query the self-test results of the instrument (TopBoard, BottomBoard and fan).

commands.name: wait
commands.description: Make the instrument wait for all pending operations to complete before executing further commands.

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Select a channel and set its voltage and current in a single command; query the voltage/current of the specified channel.

parameters.name: voltage
parameters.range: model/channel dependent (e.g. 0 to 32V on CH1 of DP832A)

parameters.name: current
parameters.range: model/channel dependent (e.g. 0 to 3.2A on CH1 of DP832A)

commands.name: set_voltage
commands.description: Set/query the output voltage of the specified (or current) channel. Accepts MINimum, MAXimum, UP or DOWN.

commands.name: voltage_step
commands.description: Set/query the voltage change step used by UP/DOWN of the voltage command for the specified channel.

parameters.name: step
parameters.range: 0 to max voltage of channel; default 0.001V or 0.01V model dependent

commands.name: voltage_triggered
commands.description: Set/query the trigger voltage of the specified channel applied when a trigger occurs.

parameters.name: voltage
parameters.range: 0 to maximum voltage of channel; default 0V

commands.name: voltage_protection_clear
commands.description: Clear the OVP circuit and label of the specified channel and turn the channel output on.

commands.name: voltage_protection_level
commands.description: Set/query the overvoltage protection (OVP) value of the specified channel.

commands.name: voltage_protection_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the overvoltage protection (OVP) function of the specified channel.

commands.name: voltage_protection_tripped
commands.description: Query whether OVP occurred on the specified channel. Returns YES or NO.

commands.name: voltage_range
commands.description: Select/query the output range of the channel (single-channel models DP813A/DP813/DP811A/DP811 only).

commands.name: set_current
commands.description: Set/query the output current of the specified (or current) channel. Accepts MINimum, MAXimum, UP or DOWN.

commands.name: current_step
commands.description: Set/query the current change step used by UP/DOWN of the current command for the specified channel.

parameters.name: step
parameters.range: 0 to max current of channel; default model dependent

commands.name: current_triggered
commands.description: Set/query the trigger current of the specified channel applied when a trigger occurs.

parameters.name: current
parameters.range: 0 to maximum current of channel; default 0.1A

commands.name: current_protection_clear
commands.description: Clear the OCP circuit and label of the specified channel and turn the channel output on.

commands.name: current_protection_level
commands.description: Set/query the overcurrent protection (OCP) value of the specified channel.

commands.name: current_protection_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the overcurrent protection (OCP) function of the specified channel.

commands.name: current_protection_tripped
commands.description: Query whether OCP occurred on the specified channel. Returns YES or NO.

commands.name: measure_all
commands.description: Query the voltage, current and power measured at the output terminal of the specified channel.

commands.name: measure_current
commands.description: Query the current measured at the output terminal of the specified channel.

commands.name: measure_power
commands.description: Query the power measured at the output terminal of the specified channel.

commands.name: measure_voltage
commands.description: Query the voltage measured at the output terminal of the specified channel.

commands.name: select_channel
commands.description: Select/query the current channel by name (multi-channel models only).

commands.name: select_channel_numeric
commands.description: Select/query the current channel by number 1/2/3 (multi-channel models only).

commands.name: instrument_couple_trigger
commands.description: Select/query the trigger coupling channels (multi-channel models only).

parameters.name: list
parameters.range: ALL|NONE or comma-separated channels e.g. CH1,CH2

commands.name: output_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the output of the specified channel.

commands.name: output_mode
commands.description: Query the current output mode of the specified channel. Returns CV, CC or UR. :OUTP:CVCC? is an alias.

commands.name: output_ocp_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the overcurrent protection (OCP) function of the specified channel.

commands.name: output_ocp_value
commands.description: Set/query the overcurrent protection (OCP) value of the specified channel.

commands.name: output_ocp_clear
commands.description: Clear the OCP occurred label on the specified channel.

commands.name: output_ocp_alarm
commands.description: Query whether OCP occurred on the specified channel. Returns YES or NO. :OUTP:OCP:ALAR? is an alias.

commands.name: output_ovp_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the overvoltage protection (OVP) function of the specified channel.

commands.name: output_ovp_value
commands.description: Set/query the overvoltage protection (OVP) value of the specified channel.

commands.name: output_ovp_clear
commands.description: Clear the OVP occurred label on the specified channel.

commands.name: output_ovp_alarm
commands.description: Query whether OVP occurred on the specified channel. Returns YES or NO. :OUTP:OVP:ALAR? is an alias.

commands.name: output_range
commands.description: Select/query the current output range of the channel (single-channel models DP813A/DP813/DP811A/DP811 only).

commands.name: output_sense
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the remote Sense function of the channel (only on channels that support Sense).

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: ON|OFF (default OFF; returns NONE if unsupported)

commands.name: output_timer
commands.description: Set a group of timer parameters (voltage/current/time) for the specified channel; query the first 5 groups.

commands.name: output_timer_state
commands.description: Turn on/off and query the timer output function of the specified channel.

commands.name: output_track
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the track function of the specified channel (only on tracking-capable channels).

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: ON|OFF (default OFF; returns NONE if unsupported)

commands.name: initiate
commands.description: Initialize the trigger system.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Set/query the trigger source of the sequence trigger system.

commands.name: trigger_delay
commands.description: Set/query the trigger delay time of the sequence trigger system.

commands.name: delay_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the delay output function of the current channel.

commands.name: delay_cycles
commands.description: Set/query the number of cycles of the delayer (N for finite, I for infinite).

commands.name: delay_groups
commands.description: Set/query the number of output groups of the delayer.

commands.name: delay_parameter
commands.description: Set/query the delayer parameters (output state and time) of the specified group(s).

commands.name: delay_endstate
commands.description: Set/query the end state of the delayer (output on/off/last after completion).

commands.name: delay_stop
commands.description: Set/query the stop condition of the delayer based on voltage, current or power thresholds.

commands.name: timer_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the timing output function.

commands.name: timer_cycles
commands.description: Set/query the number of cycles of the timer (N for finite, I for infinite).

commands.name: timer_groups
commands.description: Set/query the number of output groups of the timer.

commands.name: timer_parameter
commands.description: Set/query the timer parameters (voltage, current, time) of the specified group(s).

commands.name: timer_endstate
commands.description: Set/query the end state of the timer (output off or last after completion).

commands.name: status_questionable_condition
commands.description: Query the condition register of the questionable status register (single-channel models).

commands.name: status_questionable_enable
commands.description: Set/query the enable register of the questionable status register.

commands.name: status_questionable_event
commands.description: Query (and clear) the event register of the questionable status register.

commands.name: status_questionable_instrument_enable
commands.description: Set/query the enable register of the channel questionable status register (multi-channel models).

commands.name: status_questionable_instrument_event
commands.description: Query (and clear) the event register of the channel questionable status register (multi-channel models).

commands.name: system_beeper_immediate
commands.description: Sound the beeper immediately.

commands.name: system_beeper_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the beeper.

commands.name: system_brightness
commands.description: Set/query the screen brightness.

commands.name: system_gpib_address
commands.description: Set/query the GPIB address.

commands.name: system_rs232_baud
commands.description: Set/query the RS232 baud rate.

commands.name: system_rs232_databit
commands.description: Set/query the RS232 data bit.

commands.name: system_rs232_parity
commands.description: Set/query the RS232 parity mode.

commands.name: system_rs232_stopbit
commands.description: Set/query the RS232 stop bit.

commands.name: system_contrast
commands.description: Set/query the screen contrast.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Query and clear the error messages in the error queue.

commands.name: system_key_lock
commands.description: Lock or unlock a specified front-panel key; query whether a key is locked.

commands.name: system_remote_lock_state
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the remote lock.

commands.name: system_language
commands.description: Set/query the system language.

commands.name: system_local
commands.description: Return the power supply from remote mode to local mode.

commands.name: system_remote
commands.description: Return the power supply from local mode to remote mode.

commands.name: system_lock
commands.description: Lock or unlock the front panel; query whether the front panel is locked.

commands.name: system_rwlock
commands.description: Turn on or off the remote lock (front panel disabled).

parameters.name: state
parameters.range: ON|OFF (default OFF; omitted defaults to ON)

commands.name: system_onoff_sync
commands.description: Turn on/off and query the output on/off sync function (tracking-capable channels).

commands.name: system_otp
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the over-temperature protection (OTP) function.

commands.name: system_poweron
commands.description: Select/query the configuration used at power-on (factory default or last state).

commands.name: system_saver
commands.description: Enable/disable and query the screen saver function.

commands.name: system_selftest_board
commands.description: Query the self-test results of TopBoard and BottomBoard. Returns PASS or FAIL.

commands.name: system_selftest_fan
commands.description: Query the self-test result of the fan. Returns PASS or FAIL.

commands.name: system_selftest_temp
commands.description: Query the self-test result of the temperature. Returns the temperature in degrees C.

commands.name: system_track_mode
commands.description: Set/query the track mode (synchronous or independent) for tracking-capable channels.

commands.name: system_version
commands.description: Query the SCPI version number of the system (YYYY.V form).
